resources.name: Adobe Commerce Optimizer – Automotive Categories API
resources.description:
Automotive parts & accessories category hierarchy via the Adobe Commerce Optimizer Data Ingestion REST API.

Two catalog families:
- parts-catalog: Engine, Brakes, Suspension, Electrical
- seasonal-catalog: Winter Prep, Summer Performance

Run request 0 first to get your access token, then copy the token value into the AUTOPARTS_ACCESS_TOKEN environment variable.

resources.name: Authentication
resources.description: Get an IMS access token. Copy the access_token value from the response and paste it into your environment's accessToken variable prefixed with 'Bearer '.

resources.name: Parts Catalog
resources.description: Core parts-catalog family: Engine & Drivetrain, Brakes, Suspension & Steering, Electrical & Lighting.

resources.name: Seasonal Catalog
resources.description: seasonal-catalog family: time-limited campaign trees for Winter Vehicle Prep and Summer Performance.

resources.name: Product–Category Assignment
resources.description: Assign product SKUs to categories across one or more families.

resources.name: 0. Get Access Token
resources.description:
Exchanges client credentials for an Adobe IMS Bearer token using the OAuth 2.0 client_credentials flow.

After a successful response, copy the access_token value and update your environment's accessToken variable to: Bearer <paste_token_here>

resources.name: 1. Create Root Category – Engine & Drivetrain
resources.description:
Creates the top-level Engine & Drivetrain root in the parts-catalog family.
parentSlug must be an empty string for all level 1 root categories.

resources.name: 2. Create Child Category – Engine Components (Level 2)
resources.description:
Creates a level 2 subcategory nested under engine-drivetrain.
parentSlug must exactly match the parent's slug.

resources.name: 3. Create Grandchild Category – Pistons & Rings (Level 3)
resources.description:
Creates a level 3 leaf category for Pistons & Rings.
Images and metaTags are optional at this depth — leaf nodes feeding product listing pages often don't need a hero image.

resources.name: 4. Batch Create – Brakes & Suspension Trees
resources.description:
Seeds two complete category trees in a single request:
- Brakes (root + 3 children: Brake Pads, Rotors & Drums, Calipers & Hardware)
- Suspension & Steering (root + 2 children: Shocks & Struts, Control Arms & Ball Joints)

Successful response: { "status": "ACCEPTED", "acceptedCount": 7 }

resources.name: 5. Create Full Rich Category – Electrical & Lighting
resources.description:
Creates the Electrical & Lighting root with full SEO metadata, dual images (BASE hero + THUMBNAIL) with customRoles, plus three child subcategories in one request:
- Batteries & Charging
- Headlights & Tail Lights
- Sensors & Switches

This is the template shape for SEO-driven category landing pages.

resources.name: 6. Create Seasonal Family – Winter & Summer Campaigns
resources.description:
Creates two seasonal campaign trees under the separate seasonal-catalog family in one request:
- Winter Vehicle Prep (root + Cold Weather Batteries + Winter Wipers & Fluid)
- Summer Performance (root + Cooling System Upgrades)

Seasonal categories are independent from parts-catalog and can be toggled without affecting permanent navigation.
Images include customRoles for homepage-banner slot targeting.

resources.name: 7. Assign Automotive Part to Categories
resources.description:
Assigns the ProStart AGM Group H6 850CCA Battery to categories in both families simultaneously:
- electrical-lighting/batteries-charging (parts-catalog) — permanent placement
- winter-prep/cold-weather-batteries (seasonal-catalog) — campaign placement

A single SKU can belong to categories across multiple families without data duplication.
